title: Master's Program in Health Management Mission and Vision
content:
Master's Program in Health Management Mission and Vision

Mission

By offering an environment based on contemporary knowledge that respects universal and cultural values; to educate health managers who are competent in the health sector, who have high social responsibility awareness, think analytically, and contribute to the accumulation of knowledge of the country.

Vision

Health management education with awareness at national and international level, Turkey is contributing to administrative development and the capacity of the health system, other disciplines and providing a synergistic effect on the science of health management, with scientific work skills of health managers and academics are being trained by a pioneering postgraduate education and research unit.
